text:
さすがに今までとは地形が違うね。
応用を利かせながら進んでいけば
いいんじゃないかな？

区画がきちんと整備されてるし
狭い部分もあるけど広い箇所もあるね。

さ、遠慮しないで
どんどん進んじゃ

This is a far cry from the terrain we usually
run into. Think you can find a way to turn it to
your advantage?

The way it's segmented off is interesting.
And you've got a mix of choke points
and wide-open areas.

Anyway, dive in! Don't worry
about holding back.
